notes: Cathedral gravity deck · hard-mode (BLOW OUT THE CANDLES). Full moon, demons going wild, entropy in overdrive. The deck pushes both stats hard and accelerates the steamboat — the win is to LIGHT THE CANDLES before the river takes the bank. 18 cards. Half are endgame-flagged so the late game gets brutal.

cards.title: THE MOON RISES HIGHER
cards.flavor: The river-window pane lights up cold. Every demon on the board gets one more turn of duration. Frasier's cup of coffee is now luminescent.

cards.title: THE DEMON BRINGS A FRIEND
cards.flavor: He doesn't introduce them. They sit on a folding chair two feet from his stool. They are wearing the same clothes he is.

cards.title: THE RIVER TAKES A FOOT
cards.flavor: Outside, a foot of the river bank slips into the water. The river-window glass shudders.

cards.title: DRUNK UNCLE FINDS THE WORKBENCH
cards.flavor: He's leaning on the steamboat model with his elbow. He doesn't notice. He's telling Mackenzie about the war.

cards.title: THE TWINS SYNCHRONIZE
cards.flavor: Quinn and Quill are mid-conversation at the river window. The river outside has started to mirror the cadence of their speech.

effects.note: their voices fit the empty platform

cards.title: THE CAKE IS SINGING
cards.flavor: In the dish-station fridge, the cake has begun to hum. Three of the unlit candles are vibrating.

cards.title: ELICIA AT THE DOOR
cards.flavor: She's at the river window, looking out. Not the inside. She's looking at the river. She doesn't turn when you say her name.

effects.note: her presence steadies you even like this

cards.title: THE SUPERFAN SPEAKS IN UNISON
cards.flavor: She's mouthing what Elicia is about to say. Then Elicia says it. The superfan is one beat ahead. Then two. Then three.

cards.title: THE CRITIC WRITES THE EULOGY
cards.flavor: He's at the JUDGEMENT platform, taking notes. The notes are already past-tense.

cards.title: THE DINER MODEL IS FULL
cards.flavor: Every booth in the 1:48 D'Ambrosio's has a figurine now. None of them are Frasier's. The lights are all on inside the model.

cards.title: THE LIGHTS STROBE ONCE
cards.flavor: Every light in the cathedral pulses, hard, once. Then they all come back on at the wrong color.

cards.title: SOMEONE DROPPED A CANDLE
cards.flavor: One of the candles from the cake is on the floor. It is not lit. It is rolling. It rolls toward the steamboat.

cards.title: THE STEAMBOAT IS LISTENING
cards.flavor: It needs one fewer beat than you thought. It will accept anything you give it tonight.

cards.title: THE SINKHOLE OPENS
cards.flavor: Outside, the river bank gives the way river banks give when no one is looking. The river-window threshold closes. The cathedral tilts a half-degree.

cards.title: THE DEMONS FIND EACH OTHER
cards.flavor: Every demon active on the board is now in the same square foot of floor. They are introducing themselves.

cards.title: MIDNIGHT
cards.flavor: The clock on Frasier's wall — the only one in the cathedral — clicks to 12:00. The cake is still in the fridge. The candles are still in the cake. The matches are in his apron.

effects.text: if the candles aren't lit by next turn, the room ends.

cards.title: THE WIRES UNHOOKED
cards.flavor: A finished arcana installation gone dark. Still finished. Just not alive.

cards.title: A DRAFT BURNED ITSELF
cards.flavor: Two of them. Inside the workbench drawer. He hadn't opened it tonight.
